schemes.details: Acquire a legendary item to prolong life
Seize control of an army or faction
Obtain an ancient artifact of great power
Unleash a great catastrophe upon the world
Pursue a forbidden love or dark desire
Conquer a region, kingdom, or the world
Avenge a past humiliation or loss
Channel an otherworldly power or entity

weaknesses: A hidden object holds the villain's soul or power
A special weapon is the villain's bane
An ancient prophecy or riddle foretells the villain's defeat
An elemental weakness (fire, cold, radiant, etc.)
A destabilizing secret that could ruin the villain if revealed
A selfish betrayer within the villain's inner circle
The villain's power is bound to an artifact that can be destroyed
A protective charm or ward worn by enemies
Creeping insanity from the villain's own power source
A rival villain who wants the same thing
A family connection to one of the heroes
A forbidden love that conflicts with the villain's goals
adventure_hooks: A villain terrorizes the local region and someone must stop them
An NPC patron asks the heroes to deal with a growing problem
The heroes find a map leading to a place of adventure
A mysterious stranger approaches with a dangerous quest
The heroes discover an ancient prophecy that names them
A natural disaster reveals a hidden dungeon entrance
A villain's minion seeks to defect and offers information
An NPC disappears under mysterious circumstances
The heroes stumble upon a crime in progress
A dying NPC delivers a cryptic message and an old key
